name: Alert
text: +5 bonus to initiative, you can't be surprised while conscious, and creatures don't gain advantage on attacks against you from being hidden.

name: Tough
text: Your hit point maximum increases by an amount equal to twice your level when you gain this feat, and by 2 each level thereafter.

name: Resilient
text: Increase one ability score by 1 (here, Constitution) and gain proficiency in saving throws using that ability.
